content.en:
However, even this super-level Perfect Controller-level Extreme Dao creature still has no wisdom and is full of tyrannical and chaotic will.

Bang!!!

After Ye Tian met this extreme creature, he was completely suppressed by the other party, and it was obvious that the other party's strength was a very good existence among the super-perfect controllers.

In the end, Ye Tian gave up fighting with this extreme creature, and immediately retreated, and quickly got rid of the other party.

In the following days, Ye Tian hurried from all directions, but he encountered extreme creatures that were comparable to those of the super perfect controller.

Of course, these extreme creatures are not a big danger, even if they can't be defeated, they can be eliminated.

"Go ahead and see what dangers come your way!"

Ye Tian decided.

He condensed a clone of will, so that the clone of will did not care about any danger and kept shuttling forward.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to finally perceive a black curtain, enveloping the endless void.

In an instant, a big black hand grabbed Ye Tian.

In an instant, Ye Tian's clone of his will was pinched to death.

......

"Sky Shadow Dragon!"

Ye Tian was a little dignified.

Through the copying talent, he naturally sensed the identity of the shady curtain, which was the Sky Shadow Dragon.

Moreover, that Sky Shadow Dragon was extremely powerful, although it did not reach the strength of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm, it was definitely an incomparably terrifying existence among the Super Perfect Controllers, much more powerful than the Great Sun King Monkey he had ever seen.

When an ordinary super-perfect master encounters that Sky Shadow Dragon, he has no power to resist at all, and he will definitely be killed instantly.

However, he still felt that the Sky Shadow Dragon had no wisdom, and his body was still filled with a tyrannical aura of will.

Although the will clone was destroyed by the Sky Shadow Dragon, Ye Tian was not without gains, he copied a mutated perfect level ancestral gift from the Sky Shadow Dragon - the mutated shadow perfect level ancestral gift!

This Mutant Shadow Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment is also quite good, much more powerful than the ordinary Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment.

"It seems that this Sky Shadow Dragon has also devoured the treasure that mutates the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian searched from other directions, and also encountered a powerful Extreme Dao creature similar to the Sky Shadow Dragon.

These extreme creatures all have a certain territory, and although they have little intelligence, they do not invade each other.

But if Ye Tian wanted to pass through their territory, he would be attacked by them.

And Ye Tian couldn't defeat an extreme creature like the Sky Shadow Dragon, once he went to their territory, he would be killed by them.

"It seems that the Stone Dragon Demon Lord has also encountered these extreme creatures, and has been killed again and again, so there is no way to move on!" Ye Tian guessed.

It can be said that this area is no different from a prison, and the Stone Dragon Demon Lord is trapped, and he has not been able to break through for countless years.

And for the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, if there is no way to move forward, it will be of little value.

"With the strength of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, as well as his talent for infinite resurrection, even if the real body is killed here, he will not really die, and he will definitely scrape all the resources here!"

Ye Tian wasn't going to waste time looking for resources here, he had to break through the blockade of these extreme creatures like the Sky Shadow Dragon.

But how can he break through the blockade? If he relies on strength alone, he can't do it at present, and he has to think of other ways.

"Those terrifying super perfect master-level extreme path creatures, find the weaker one among them, mine can still resist a few moves. If you create a Extreme Path Control Technique that intercepts the opponent, it will provide hope for one of the replica bodies to escape. As long as you can stop the other party for a while, it will be considered a success!"

Ye Tian then began to prepare for the creation of such an Extreme Dao Control Technique.

Time passed slowly, and tens of millions of eternal years passed before I knew it.

On this day, Ye Tian successfully created a very powerful Extreme Dao Control Technique-Extreme Dao Realm!

The Extreme Dao Realm is the use of a large number of Extreme Dao powers, using the power of various Extreme Dao to form an Extreme Dao Realm to bind the enemy, and once this Extreme Dao control technique is cast, Ye Tian himself will not be able to move.

Moreover, this Extreme Dao Control Technique consumes a lot of Extreme Dao power, and the consumption is too great.

It can be said that such an extreme control technique is not very difficult to create, but it is very suitable for use at this time.

Ye Tian's purpose was to drag an Extreme Dao creature, not kill it.

Of course, just a replica body has very little hope of trapping the other party.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to invest two replica bodies and two will clones, one of which had a copy body to stay on that black island.

And a replica body plus two will clones go to the other party's extreme creature, delaying time at the expense of the two will clones, and the duplicate body creates opportunities.

"Let's hope we can make it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, inside the Daoless Tower, Ye Tian disintegrated the copy body and the clone by himself.

Subsequently, Ye Tian condensed another copy body on the black island, and then condensed another will clone.

When everything was ready, the three bodies shuttled in one direction.

In this direction, he would encounter an extremely terrifying Extreme Creature, the Golden Phoenix Bird, whose strength was slightly weaker than that of the Sky Dome Shadow Dragon.

Therefore, Ye Tiancai chose to use the other party as a breakthrough.

Soon, Ye Tian encountered this golden phoenix bird.

"Let's get started!"

The two will clones immediately made a move, and instantly cast the Extreme Dao Realm.

Rumble!!

The two Extreme Dao Realms instantly unleashed, covering this golden phoenix bird.

This move completely angered the Golden Phoenix Bird, and it immediately grabbed it with one claw.

Bang!!!!

The layers of light curtains in the Extreme Dao Realm are shattered, and each layer of light curtains is the embodiment of the power of the Extreme Dao.

The light that the layers of Extreme Dao power turned into was pierced and shattered, but the Extreme Dao Realm still blocked the blow, and it was not shattered.

At this time, Ye Tian's copy body immediately crossed over, preparing to pass through here.

The Golden Phoenix Bird attacked very angrily, and finally broke Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Realm, but there were two Extreme Dao Realms, so the Golden Phoenix Bird was still trapped.

But soon, the second Extreme Realm was shattered.

After that, Ye Tian's two will clones fought with this Golden Phoenix Bird, but they were not its opponents, and they were soon killed by the Golden Phoenix Bird.

However, Ye Tian's copy body had already left here, and the Golden Phoenix Bird could not lock Ye Tian's location.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief and said.
